other_observers: Photos by Cathy Sheeter. Doug Faulkner and Steve Stachowiak also present, and I am pretty certain, saw this individual.;
duration: about 1 minute, but off and one
description: Male redpoll with fairly pale and fairly limited pink on breast, sandy gray background color on back, moderate diffuse streaking on flanks, one very thin streak on undertail coverts, large unmarked rump patch. Also, outertail feather extensively white below, suggested as likely mark for HORE by Thede Tobish. Bill small and stubby. Red "poll" somewhat limited. Bold thick greater wingcovert bar, moderate white edges to tertialsBehaviors: at feedersCall: not heard for certainPlumage: unknown
